calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

David M. King, Esq. appeared for plaintiff WSM Enterprises, Inc., dba On-Site Contracting, a California Corporation.
Vinnie Sebastiano, Project Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Trophy Properties B10 DE, LLC, a California limited liability company.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 10, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, January 11, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff WSM Enterprises, Inc., dba On-Site Contracting, a California corporation, and against defendant Trophy Properties B10 DE, LLC, a California limited liability company as follows:

Principal - $13,597.50.
Interest - To Be Determined.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Sanctions - Per Memorandum of Costs.

The mechanic's lien is foreclosed.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than January 21, 2010.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2009 Set For Trial On Jan-11-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
